download.shown_editing: this object is only shown while editing - click to make it public
download.shown_everyone: this object is shown to everyone - click to make it private
draw.edit_title: edit this image in the drawing editor
draw.load_error: Could not load the image into the editor.
draw.place_error: There was a problem placing the image.
draw.read_error: Could not read the drawing from the editor.
draw.still_loading: The image editor is still loading. Give it a moment and try again.
draw.title: image editor
edit.browser_unsupported: Your browser is not supported. Update to a recent version of Firefox or Chrome.
edit.no_object: The server did not reply with any object. The file type you were uploading could either not be supported (look around for more modules!) or there could be an internal problem. Check the log file to be sure!
edit.server_communication: There was a problem communicating with the server
edit.undo_revisions_confirm:
Looking for an "undo" option?
HOTGLUE keeps record of your recent edits - it's called "revisions".
Would you like to browse through the revisions of this page?
edit.upload_problem: There was a problem uploading a file. Make sure you are not exceeding the file size limits set in the server configuration.
edit.upload_problem_data: There was a problem uploading the file (%s)
edit.upload_problem_status: There was a problem uploading a file (status %s)
errors.attr_type: Argument "attr" need to be either array or string
iframe.visitors_can_interact: visitors will be able to interact with the webpage below
image.height_zero: Required argument "height" is zero or does not exist
image.width_zero: Required argument "width" is zero or does not exist
lang.name: English
lock.acquire_failed: Could not acquire lock to %s in %sms
object.create_error: Error creating an object in page %s
object.get_name: get the name of this object (for linking to it)
object.link_prompt:
Enter link (e.g. http://hotglue.me or pagename or anchor name).
To add target specify its name after a space (e.g. http://hotglue.me _blank)
object.read_only: Object %s is read-only, not deleting it
object.symlink: make this object appear on all pages
object.target_prompt: You can link to this object by copying and pasting this string
object.zindex: bring object to foreground or background
page.clear_bg_confirm: Do you want to clear the current background image?
page.delete_confirm: Really delete the current page and all it's revisions?
page.grid_tooltip: show/hide grid or change grid size by dragging (%sx%s)
page.name_new_page: Name the page to be created
page.server_comm_problem: There was a problem communicating with the server
page.toggle_bg_fixed: toggle between having the background image fixed or having it scroll with the rest of the page
page.upload_problem_data: There was a problem uploading the file (%s)
page.upload_problem_size: There was a problem uploading a file. Make sure you are not exceeding the file size limits set in the server configuration.
page.upload_problem_status: There was a problem uploading a file (status %s)
request.cross_origin: Cross-origin requests not supported for this method
service.arg_type_array: Invalid type of argument %s, expected array
service.arg_type_bool: Invalid type of argument %s, expected bool
service.arg_type_float: Invalid type of argument %s, expected float
service.arg_type_int: Invalid type of argument %s, expected int
soundboard.mode_toggle_tooltip: toggle soundboard mode: on the published page, tap video tiles to trigger clips with mixed audio (takes effect after a reload of the published page)
state.class_not_set: Error saving state as class "object" is not set
state.nobody_claimed: Error saving state as nobody claimed element
state.object_not_exist: Error saving state as object does not exist
text.change_line_height: change line height, click to reset to default one
text.change_padding: change padding, click to reset to default one
text.change_padding_value: change padding (%s, %s), click to reset to default one
text.change_typeface: change typeface (click to cycle through available typefaces)
text.drag_to_change_font_size: drag to change font size, click to reset to default one
text.drag_to_change_font_size_value: drag to change font size (%s), click to reset to default one
text.drag_to_change_font_size_value_px: drag to change font size (%spx), click to reset to default one
text.link_disabled: this link is disabled for editing
text.woff_web_font: this is a WOFF web-font (%s) - while only supported on the latest browser versions, this text should look similar across different browsers and operating systems supporting WOFF
webvideo.error_unsupported_provider: Only youtube, vimeo and peertube videos are supported at the moment.
webvideo.menu_embed_title: embed a youtube, vimeo or peertube video
webvideo.toggle_autoplay_title: toggle automatic playback of video (takes effect after a reload)
webvideo.toggle_loop_title: toggle looping of video (takes effect after a reload)
welcome.browser_note: We recommend you to use Mozilla Firefox browser when editing in HOTGLUE. Firefox is a very reliable and modern web-browser, it is our favorite!
welcome.enjoy: Enjoy! [click this message to make it go away]
welcome.intro: A short intro before you start:
welcome.more_info: You can find more information on how to work with HOTGLUE on our web-site. Make sure to check out "What is HOTGLUE?" and "How to HOTGLUE?" pages!
welcome.ready: Your Content Manipulation System is ready to go!
welcome.step1: 1. Right now you are in editing mode. You can use single and double click to access the menus - they will appear next to the mouse pointer.
welcome.step2: 2. Click on the canvas (white background of the page) to open a menu which will let you create new objects, upload files and embed YouTube and Vimeo videos! Once you made an object click on it to activate its contextual menu.
welcome.step3: 3. Double-click on the canvas will give you a menu of options to change preferences, show a grid, make new pages, set background picture and more!
welcome.step4_post: edit" from the address of the page (the URL) to see the "view-only" version. That's how your page will look to everyone else!
